title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 24.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: A nightmare for Keir Starmer - but one which could also turn into a nightmare for Andy Burnham and the Labour party as a whole, too:
items.content_text: A nightmare for Keir Starmer - but one which could also turn into a nightmare for Andy Burnham and the Labour party as a whole, too:

items.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Burnham has set himself a hard task,  but I dont think we really know the dynamics of a by-election serving as a test prime ministerial run from a popular local figure, because it's madness and has never happened.
